critical_issues.title: Missing dependencies
critical_issues.description: Ticket depends on GOgent-041 (Category field), GOgent-041b (weekly aggregation), and GOgent-037b (code_snippet) which are all pending

critical_issues.title: Chaos test doesn't test contention
critical_issues.description: Current design has each agent use unique file/errorType, so composite keys never collide. Missing test for multiple agents on SAME file/error.

critical_issues.title: Time estimate underscoped
critical_issues.description: 8h estimate should be 10-12h for full scope, or 5-6h for reduced scope

major_issues.title: Session replay state management unspecified
major_issues.description: Existing runner resets state between scenarios. Session replay needs persistent state across events within a session.

major_issues.title: Type duplication with ToolEvent
major_issues.description: Proposed SessionEvent duplicates ToolEvent from generator.go with different field names
